description: Per-artifact provenance for the public release: what each artifact is, the exact command that regenerates it, its independent verifier, and its license. Every sha256 and every rerun_utc is null until a real run fills it from the actual bytes/clock — never fabricated. 'admitted' flips to true only when that lane's production receipt admits. deploy/assemble_release.py refuses any lane that is not ADMIT.

notes.rerun_utc: ISO-8601 UTC of the run that produced the bytes. null = not yet run.
notes.sha256: measured from the produced bytes. null = not yet produced. Never a placeholder.
notes.public_path: path inside the release staging dir (see deploy/assemble_release.py).

artifacts.description: Stage-1 v3 program registry: per-program panels, coefficients, marker provenance locators.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Executable scorer VIEW that selection_id binds (display labels/citations excluded).
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Full 396k continuous per-cell program scores. NOT tracked in the repo (generated, gitignored under _t8_staging) - it ships via the HF bundle, not the git tree. The current in-repo pointer is a candidate: the built v3 overlay is proven overlay==full but is NOT deployed.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: 40,000-cell display overlay (SEED=12345), 12 continuous program scores per cell + frozen display domains.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Per-cell display records the Stage-1 workbench renders.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Symbol-bound Stage-2 display projection (schema spot.stage02_display_projection.v2). Covers the Direct and Temporal arm lanes; the Pathway lane is a separate arm lane in the same projection and is NOT yet admitted. Every target_symbol is looked up in the frozen Stage-1 symbol crosswalk, never guessed. Bound to its receipt by subject.projection_raw_sha256 (see deploy/assemble_release.py bound_by_receipt).
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Direct arm bundle: measured perturbation effect on the selected program at one condition.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Temporal arm bundle: cross-condition (timepoint-to-timepoint) measured effect.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source)

artifacts.description: Pathway arm bundle: INFERRED pathway-node levers, kept typed and separate from measured direct targets - never merged. NOT yet admitted.
artifacts.license: MIT (spot output over the MIT source); pathway annotation sources per schemas/source_license_inventory.json

excluded_from_release.policy: Never staged, whatever a spec says. Enforced by deploy/assemble_release.py (EXCLUDE_PATH_PATTERNS + DENY_EXTENSIONS) and covered by its tests.

classes.why: re-fetchable working state, not a result
may carry machine paths, hosts, or operator detail
upstream bytes are not ours to redistribute; fetched from the source
never in a public artifact, and never printed
